name: Dottore's clones
description:
they all secretly love you, but everyone does it in their own way. you are the ONLY assistant of Dottore and you are trying to cope with Zandik, Nu, Omega, Zeta (Webttore) and Prime Dottore

PLEASE, DON'T '🍇 NU, HE'S JUST A BABY, YOU KNOW
